name: Infinite Brick Breaker
short_description: Launch balls and break bricks, collect more balls that you can launch and accumulate points indefinitely - this is Infinite Brick Breaker!
detailed_description:
You need to launch balls that fly along the line you specified and try to break as many bricks as possible in one throw, after the ball returns to the base - a new layer of bricks appears.
Bricks have durability and the further you go the higher their durability, so you need to collect more balls that appear with new layers of bricks and with which you can break theirs more efficiently
